plugins.name: frontend-code-review
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic frontend code review for Node ecosystem projects. Read-only — reports findings without editing files.

plugins.name: vue-code-review
plugins.description: Vue/Nuxt-focused code review (detects Nuxt automatically). Read-only — reports findings without editing files.

plugins.name: apply-fix
plugins.description: Applies fixes (from prior review findings or check failures) and iterates the project's check commands (lint, type-check, build, test) until all pass.

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: Branches from main, commits all uncommitted changes, and opens a single consolidated pull request.
